header.subtitle: INDUSTRY-SPECIFIC APPS
header.title: Own your app outright Built for your business

positioning_callout: Want to own a single app outright? Browse below. Want an all-in-one growing platform with ongoing updates? Explore Minis.

trust_signals.publishing: Choose how your app is published: under your own Google Play developer account from day one, or under Trai Inc.'s account with a formal ownership transfer once you're ready — your call.
trust_signals.source_code: Full repository handover — source code, build scripts, and documentation included, no extra fee.
trust_signals.payments: Fixed-price contracts with advance payment. You know the exact cost before we start. Milestone payments on larger projects.
trust_signals.maintenance: Post-launch maintenance: 20% of project cost annually, covering updates, bug fixes, and OS/platform compatibility.

apps.name: E-Commerce App
apps.description: A complete mobile storefront with catalog management and seamless checkout.

apps.name: Pharmacy Delivery App
apps.description: Enable customers to upload prescriptions and order medicines online directly to your local pharmacy.

apps.name: Restaurant Ordering App
apps.description: Stop paying 30% commissions. Run your own food delivery and dine-in ordering system.
